name: Sector Concentration Alert
description: Daily (11:45 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Queries Neo4j to detect if any strategy watchlist is overweight in a single sector (>40% of stocks). Creates diversification warnings before the scorecard runs.

parameters.content:
## Sector Concentration Alert

Required: neo4j, postgresApi
Flags watchlists with >40% in one sector
Reads FROM Neo4j graph relationships

parameters.query: MATCH (c:Company)-[:IN_WATCHLIST]->(w:Watchlist) MATCH (c)-[:BELONGS_TO_SECTOR]->(s:Sector) WITH w.name AS strategy, s.name AS sector, count(c) AS sector_count WITH strategy, sector, sector_count, sum(sector_count) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy) AS total_in_strategy WITH strategy, sector, sector_count, total_in_strategy, toFloat(sector_count) / total_in_strategy AS concentration WHERE concentration > 0.4 RETURN strategy, sector, sector_count, total_in_strategy, round(concentration * 100, 1) AS concentration_pct ORDER BY concentration DESC

INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity, metadata) SELECT '', 'sector_concentration', '{{$json.strategy}}', 'Watchlist {{$json.strategy}} is {{$json.concentration_pct}}% concentrated in {{$json.sector}} ({{$json.sector_count}}/{{$json.total_in_strategy}} stocks). Consider diversification.', 'warning', '{"sector": "{{$json.sector}}", "concentration": {{$json.concentration_pct}}, "count": {{$json.sector_count}}, "total": {{$json.total_in_strategy}}}' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alerts WHERE alert_type='sector_concentration' AND strategy='{{$json.strategy}}' AND triggered_at::date=CURRENT_DATE);
